# Regression: rect with rect hole but with stall_face_clipping off.
# Used to isolate whether missing perimeter stalls are from the filter
# or from upstream placement/spine issues.

polygon outer
0,0
800,0
800,800
0,800
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

polygon hole
300,300
500,300
500,500
300,500
----
hole: 4 vertices

set stall_face_clipping=false
----
set stall_face_clipping=false

generate
----

snapshot
----
